trans-unit.source: Please select a page in the page tree to check for accessibility issues.
Page not available in your allowed languages.
This page is not translated to any of the languages you have access to. Please select a different page that is available in one of your allowed languages.
The request signature is invalid. Please refresh the page and try again.
Page structure could not be rendered
Mindful A11y could not securely render this frontend preview. Verify that the frontend URL is reachable and allows framing by the TYPO3 backend.
The analysis session could not be created. Please try again.
The page preview took too long to load.
The frontend page refused to be embedded, or the analysis session expired.
The page could not be rendered.
The structure analysis failed while examining the page.
The analysis result was too large or could not be read.
Editing information for the found elements could not be loaded.
The frontend preview is not available for structure analysis on this page.
The frontend preview URL generated for this page is invalid.
The structure analysis requested editing information for too many records at once.
Hide records with inherited alternative text
Failed to load heading and landmark structure.
Could not analyze the page content. Please try again or check your connection.
Alternative text was successfully generated. Please make sure it describes the picture accurately.
An unknown error occurred. Please contact your admin or try again later.
Could not connect to OpenAI. Is the API key valid?
Use only when the image adds no information. Saving removes the alternative text and title from this reference.
Enter alternative text for the image
The change was not stored. Please try again or edit the record directly.
Alternative text inherited from file metadata:
No file references without alternative text found.
No access to missing alternative text feature.
You do not have permission to access file references. Please contact your administrator.
No access to the selected table.
Please select a record type that you have access to or contact your administrator.
Could not save the heading type. Do you have permission?
Headings without text content provide no semantic value and can confuse screen reader users. Please add descriptive text to all heading elements or remove empty headings.

Heading levels should not be skipped. For example, an <h2> should not be followed directly by an <h4> without an intervening <h3>. Proper heading structure helps screen reader users understand the content hierarchy.
Missing heading level %d — the following heading skips a level.
A clear <h1> helps users identify the page's main topic and navigate its heading structure. Add one descriptive <h1>, usually at the start of the main content.
Using one <h1> for the page's main topic makes the heading hierarchy easier to understand. Consider using <h2> or lower heading levels for additional headings.
Sets the heading level for all content elements inside this element. Automatic uses the next level.
The referenced ancestor heading could not be found in the document.
No heading elements (h1-h6) were found on this page.
This page doesn't contain any ARIA landmarks or semantic HTML landmark elements.
Could not save the landmark role. Do you have permission?
Add one main landmark to identify the page's primary content. This helps screen reader users navigate to it quickly.
A page should expose only one main landmark at a time. Multiple main landmarks can make the primary content difficult to identify.
Multiple landmarks of the same role share a label but represent different content. Provide unique labels so users can differentiate them.
Multiple unlabeled landmarks of the same role.
More than one landmark with the same role lacks a label. Add unique labels (aria-label or aria-labelledby) so users can distinguish them.
The request is missing required parameters or they are malformed. Please reload the page and try again.
You do not have permission to perform this action.
Your user session is invalid. Please refresh the page and try again.
The workspace context is invalid. Please switch to the correct workspace and try again.
You do not have access to the selected language. Please select an allowed language.
You do not have permission to edit this record or its specified fields.
You do not have access to this page. Please contact your administrator.
You do not have permission to read sys_file records. Please contact your administrator.
You do not have permission to read this file. The file may be outside your file mount boundaries.
The file could not be found. It may have been deleted or moved since this form was opened.
You do not have access to the accessibility scanner. Please contact your administrator to enable scan access.
Preview not available for this page type
The accessibility scanner requires a preview URL to scan the page. This page type does not support preview or preview is disabled.
The accessibility scanner API is not configured. Please contact your administrator to configure the API URL and token.
Pages that could not be scanned: %d
Scans this page and optionally its child pages based on the selected scope. An external service performs the analysis — pages must be publicly accessible on the internet.
Automatically discovers and scans all reachable pages from this root page by following links. An external crawler performs the analysis — all pages must be publicly accessible on the internet.
Automatic scanning is disabled when multiple pages are in scope. Select "Start scan" to analyze all selected pages.
The selected pages have changed since the last scan. Start a new scan to include all currently selected pages.

Select "Start crawl" to begin. The crawler follows all links from this root page and analyzes every reachable page. All pages must be publicly accessible on the internet — the crawler cannot access password-protected or restricted pages.
Crawl mode is only available on site root pages.
The report could not be generated. Please try again later.
The accessibility scan failed. Please try again later or contact your administrator.
The scan was canceled before it finished. Start a new scan to get results.
The scan could not be canceled. It may already have finished.
The AI review is not enabled for this page. Ask your administrator to enable it in the page TSconfig.
A language model additionally reviews all content-quality checks enabled in the scanner. AI findings are suggestions and require human judgment.

The findings below were produced by a large language model (LLM), not the deterministic axe-core engine. They may be incomplete, inaccurate, or reflect subjective judgment. Confidence values are the model's own estimates; items marked "Needs human review" were low-confidence or could not be judged reliably. Treat every item as a suggestion to confirm manually, not a definitive accessibility result.
AI review running — %d of %d checks done
Elements reviewed and assessed as appropriate: %d.
The AI review found nothing to flag.
The accessibility scanner API URL and token are not configured.
The accessibility scanner API could not be reached. Please check the API URL in the extension configuration or contact your administrator.
The accessibility scanner API is reachable and ready to use.
Could not create a new accessibility scan. Please try again or contact your administrator.
No scan ID was found for this page. Please start a new scan.
Could not load the accessibility scan results. Please try again.
Could not store the scan ID in the database. Please try again.
Last external scan — accessibility issues found: %d
Last external scan — no accessibility issues found
The requested scan result could not be found.
The requested page or translation does not exist.
The page is hidden or not yet published. The external accessibility scanner cannot access it.
You do not have access to view this scan result.
